/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/snake.dir/src/Command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake.dir/src/Food.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake.dir/src/GameState.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake.dir/src/ScoreDisplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake.dir/src/Snake.cpp.o CMakeFiles/snake.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o snake  -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system
